title: Nikola Tesla
html:
Nikola Tesla

Stub. Serbian-American inventor (AC current, induction motor) Yahir invoked in 2021 10 19 setting your heart ablaze as the genius-but-uncommercial pole of the Tesla vs Edison founder-archetype frame. Distinct from Tesla the company.
